Liu Zuan ŚäČÁļā
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Zuan (ŚäČÁļā). Fought under the Sun regents and married a princess. Liu Zuan was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
